{{form.category_file}}
{% for field in form %} {% if field.errors %} {% for error in field.errors %}
  • {{ error }}
    • {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}

    Follow the steps below to prepare your CSV file:

    • category_name - Name of the category.
    • parent_category - Name of the parent category (if applicable). Leave empty for top-level categories.
    • category_description - Short description of the category. (Optional)
    • category_image - Image of the category

    Important Note: Before importing the CSV file, ensure that the fields for category_image contain valid URLs. Upload these images first into the Media Library, copy their links, and paste them into the respective fields in the CSV file to ensure the category are imported correctly.

    Download Sample CSV
    {% endblock %}
